purpose: Current V3 Business Signals release gate. It protects the Raw -> Pool -> Card -> Frontstage chain without preserving V1/V2 Top10, public-copy, or fixed-volume release semantics.
downstream_release_rule: Release is decided by V3 monitor hard gates plus Card generation, Pool-to-Card duplicate/freshness gate, source-first frontstage gate, frontstage regression gate, operations-data sync, and same-date freshness. Raw volume, channel breadth, importance-lane coverage, score, and final QC are diagnostics unless they expose a true Card or frontstage evidence failure.
deprecated_blockers_removed: Raw count as a release blocker after Card supply is healthy
Pool target 75 as a release blocker after V3 gate records raw_to_card_supply_release=true
source-channel transient failures after peer source artifacts satisfy Card supply
forced daily presence of every old importance lane
final QC report freshness as a required asset-chain blocker
release_blockers: Pool has too little routed evidence to attempt Card generation
no usable Core Pool evidence is available for Card generation
index, directory, homepage, or contaminated text is promoted to Core Pool
blocked or degraded Raw QC item remains in Core Pool
unrecovered source-provider failure leaves Pool/Card supply below release minimum
Pool-to-Card duplicate, stale-source, title-source, source-first, or frontstage regression gate fails

pool_route_definitions.core_pool: Full evidence candidate only: original URL, readable full text, extraction method, usable evidence object, content hash, key excerpts, Raw QC allow, and a formal business-signal Card route.
pool_route_definitions.emerging_pool: Trackable early signal with usable evidence but incomplete Card proof.
pool_route_definitions.user_feedback_pool: Community, issue, forum, HN, Reddit, or X feedback. It proves discussion or friction only, not company facts.
pool_route_definitions.watchlist: Named subject or direction worth tracking but missing full Card evidence.
pool_route_definitions.index_only: Homepage, directory, product display, docs index, README, package/model page, marketplace listing, search result, SEO page, or curated entrance record kept only for indexing.
pool_route_definitions.discard: Blocked, unusable, no URL/no usable snapshot, obvious noise, or Raw QC block.
